Secure & anonymous Ether mixer
  • WHAT IS ETH MIXER

What is ETH mixer

Ethereum mixing services (Ethereum mixer / Ethereum blender) breakdown the connection ETH sender’s and receiver’s address. Ethereum Blender helps you to mix your Ethereum (ETH) using specially developed algorithms and to secure your identity. ethereum-mixer.top makes impossible to trace your new Ethereum Address! Ethereum mixing service is completely automated and works without human assistance. When mixing process is complete system simply removes all related data.

How it works

Ethereum mixing helps you to disassociate any ETH you purchased from your identity. You send your coins to a Ethereum mixing service, they take a small mixing fee, and send you an equivalent amount of mixed Ethereum to your new address.

ETH tumbler charge random commission for every single mix to provide the best privacy for your Ether transactions.

1 - 10 ETH | 0.50 % Fee

10 - 25 ETH | 0.45 % Fee

25 - 50 ETH | 0.40 % Fee

50 - 1000 ETH | 0.30 % Fee

Minimum mixing amount: 0.05 ETH

The highest protection

Our servers use advanced encryption methods to ensure the integrity of all data stored and minimize the risk of the Blockchain analysis. WE DO NOT STORE ANY LOGS. Service does not store any logs so we cannot help any organization or individual with their questions about users activity.

Low fees

While other Ethereum mixing services charge 1% and more for each transaction, our mixer helps you avoid overspending. Our fees start only at 0.5% and can be customized to make it impossible for third parties to spot the connection between addresses.

5 000+

Satisfied customers

25 000+

Mixed coins

Zero

Coins lost

Your untraceable Ethereum

SECURE

Your security and anonymity is our priority. We make sure our servers are protected against every type of attack, so you can use our mixing service with confidence.

FULLY ANONYMOUS

You'll never have to create an account to use our Ethereum mixing service. For extra privacy protection, we recommend delete session after ETH mixing.

NO LOGS

If you don't want any record of your mix, you can delete it right away. If you choose not to delete it, we'll keep it for seven days to provide customer support and then it will be deleted automatically.

Transaction Support
